definition: Stats that refer to an item's Armour use the exact value listed on the item. This means that Quality and local modifiers on the item are taken into account, but stats from other sources that change the amount of Armour actually granted to your character are not considered.

name: Item Evasion
definition: Stats that refer to an item's Evasion use the exact value listed on the item. This means that Quality and local modifiers on the item are taken into account, but stats from other sources that change the amount of Evasion actually granted to your character are not considered.

name: Item Energy Shield
definition: Stats that refer to an item's Energy Shield use the exact value listed on the item. This means that Quality and local modifiers on the item are taken into account, but stats from other sources that change the amount of Energy Shield actually granted to your character are not considered.

name: Free Rerolls
definition: Ritual Free Rerolls allow rerolling Favours an additional time at no Cost.

name: Monster Minions
definition: Monster Minions are any monsters that are part of a Rare Monster Pack. These monsters receive one modifier from each Rare Monster in the Pack. Monsters summoned or created by other Monsters do not count as Monster Minions.

name: Rogue Exile Hunting Ground
definition: Rogue Exile Hunting Grounds contain 2 additional Rogue Exiles and 5 additional Packs of Rare Beasts.

name: Room Upgrades
definition: Rooms in Atziri's Temple may have their tier upgraded in various ways, up to a default maximum of tier 3. Most rooms are upgraded via their adjacent rooms, some rooms are upgraded via Powered Paths. Garrisons may be transformed into a Legion Barracks when adjacent to a Viper Spymaster or to a Transcendant Barracks when adjacent to a Synthflesh Lab. Flesh Surgeon and Thaumaturge instead have their level equal to the highest adjacent Synthflesh Lab or Sacrificial Chamber, respectively. Quipolatl's Medallion may be used to upgrade the tier of a room by 1.

name: Additional Rare Monsters
definition: Additional Rare Monsters can spawn in Rare Monster Packs with larger pack sizes. Each Rare Monster in the Pack provides one modifier to the Pack's Minions. Additional Rare Monsters in Essence Packs also carry Essences.

name: Empowered Monster Minions
definition: Empowered Monster Minions deal increased damage and have increased health. Empowerment does not inherently increase rewards but some effects add rewards when Empowering Minions.

name: Abandoned City
definition: Abandoned Cities have very few living inhabitants. Monsters in the area are replaced by Undead. These undead have 50% chance to drop non-equipment items instead of equipment. Abandoned Cities have 25% increased Chests in the area.

name: Exceptional Item
definition: Exceptional Items have Quality over maximum or an additional Augment Socket. High Tier Rare Items found have a chance to instead drop as an Exceptional Normal Item.

name: Embrace of the Wild
definition: Protects the Bear Spirit's Allies while they are in its Presence, granting them 2% of maximum Life regenerated per second and causing 8% of the damage they would take to be taken by the Bear Spirit instead.

name: Biome
definition: Biomes are found throughout Endgame Maps. Grass, Forest, Swamp, Desert, Mountain and Water Biomes are all commonly found. Cities and special biomes are less likely to be encountered.

name: Invaded City
definition: Invaded Cities have their natural inhabitants plus 15 extra Packs of another faction. Invaded Cities gain the Biome bonuses of the invading faction. The Factions are the Ezomyte, Faridun and Vaal.

name: Crafted Modifiers
definition: Some methods of item crafting guarantee that a specific Modifier will be crafted onto the item. An item can only have one Crafted Modifier, but they otherwise behave identically to other Modifiers. Crafted Modifiers are displayed in a lighter blue colour than regular Modifiers.

name: Grand Mirror
definition: A Grand Mirror causes a reflection of the Map Boss. When the bosses are defeated Delirium fog spreads to nearby Maps. At least 1 Map the fog spreads to will be transformed into a Simulacrum.

name: Mountain's Teachings
definition: While you have any amount of Mountain's Teachings: • Attacks you use yourself and Attacks granted by this Ascendancy Class deal 15% more damage • Enemy Hits you take that would deal damage less than or equal to 30% of your maximum Life (after mitigation such as Armour and Resistances, but before other modifiers to damage taken) deal 40% less damage • You have 50% more Stun Threshold All Mountain's Teachings are lost if you go 20 seconds without gaining any.

name: Wombgifts
definition: Wombgifts are found within Breaches and are grown on The Genesis Tree. The 4 types of Wombgifts are: * Lavish Wombgift * Ornate Wombgift * Banded Wombgift * Signet Wombgift

name: Rite of the Nameless
definition: The Rite of the Nameless is a group of maps which each contain Ritual Altars and a Map Boss. Completing all Ritual Altars will drop an Effigy Piece.

name: Effigy
definition: Effigy Pieces can be placed on an incomplete Effigy in Caer Tarth to complete the Rite of the Nameless.

name: Low Runic Ward
definition: You are on Low Runic Ward if you have 35% of your maximum Runic Ward or less.

name: Savage Hit
definition: A Savage Hit is a Hit that removes at least 15% of Maximum Life.

name: Foretold Proliferation
definition: Completing this Map will apply the specified Modifier to other Maps in the Rite of the Nameless.

name: Foretold Bounty
definition: The first list of Favours at Ritual Altars in this Map will contain the specified Item.

name: Basic Maps
definition: Basic Maps are any maps with no special interaction with areas or access requirements. Notably, not Unique Maps, Deadly Map Boss Maps, Precursor Towers, Expedition Areas or Quest Areas.

name: Base Type
definition: An item's Base Type refers to the specific variety of item it is, and grants it inherent properties such as damage on Martial Weapons, defensive bonuses on Armour, or Life recovery on Life Flasks. It is also often responsible for the Level and/or Attribute Requirements to equip an item. For example: • Wrapped Quarterstaff and Long Quarterstaff are both Quarterstaff Base Types • Stocky Mitts and Linen Wraps are both Gloves Base Types • Lesser Mana Flask and Greater Mana Flask are both Mana Flask Base Types

name: Mage's Legacy
definition: There are a number of possible Mage's Legacies, each granting a different bonus: • Legacy of Amethyst • Legacy of Basalt • Legacy of Bismuth • Legacy of Diamond • Legacy of Gold • Legacy of Granite • Legacy of Jade • Legacy of Quicksilver • Legacy of Ruby • Legacy of Sapphire • Legacy of Silver • Legacy of Stibnite • Legacy of Sulphur • Legacy of Topaz Only one instance of each Mage's Legacy can apply its bonus to you at a time.

name: Legacy of Amethyst
definition: Legacy of Amethyst is a Mage's Legacy which grants +45% to Chaos Resistance.

name: Legacy of Basalt
definition: Legacy of Basalt is a Mage's Legacy which grants 150% increased Armour.

name: Legacy of Bismuth
definition: Legacy of Bismuth is a Mage's Legacy which grants +45% to all Elemental Resistances.

name: Legacy of Diamond
definition: Legacy of Diamond is a Mage's Legacy which grants 75% increased Critical Hit Chance.

name: Legacy of Gold
definition: Legacy of Gold is a Mage's Legacy which grants 45% increased Rarity of Items found.

name: Legacy of Granite
definition: Legacy of Granite is a Mage's Legacy which grants +2000 to Armour.

name: Legacy of Jade
definition: Legacy of Jade is a Mage's Legacy which grants +2000 to Evasion Rating.

name: Legacy of Quicksilver
definition: Legacy of Quicksilver is a Mage's Legacy which grants 30% increased Movement Speed.

name: Legacy of Ruby
definition: Legacy of Ruby is a Mage's Legacy which grants +60% to Fire Resistance and +5% to Maximum Fire Resistance.

name: Legacy of Sapphire
definition: Legacy of Sapphire is a Mage's Legacy which grants +60% to Cold Resistance and +5% to Maximum Cold Resistance.

name: Legacy of Silver
definition: Legacy of Silver is a Mage's Legacy which grants 30% increased Skill Speed.

name: Legacy of Stibnite
definition: Legacy of Stibnite is a Mage's Legacy which grants 150% increased Evasion Rating.

name: Legacy of Sulphur
definition: Legacy of Sulphur is a Mage's Legacy which grants 60% increased Damage, and makes the area within 2.5 metres of you Consecrated Ground while you're stationary.

name: Legacy of Topaz
definition: Legacy of Topaz is a Mage's Legacy which grants +60% to Lightning Resistance and +5% to Maximum Lightning Resistance.

name: Bonus Reward
definition: Some Remnant encounters have Bonus Rewards which provide guaranteed rewards, in addition to allowing you to choose a Runeshape Combination. Bonus rewards are granted to all party members who have not previously claimed the reward and were in the area when the Remnant was encountered.

name: Verisium Infusion
definition: A Verisium Infusion can be used instead of any of the Elemental Infusions. Skills will prioritise using non-Verisium Infusions. Verisium Infusions last for 20 seconds or until Consumed by another Skill. Your maximum number of Verisium Infusions is equal to the maximum number of any single type of Elemental Infusion you can have (3 by default).

name: Secured Strongbox
definition: Secured Strongboxes are guarded by additional Packs of Rare Monsters and may roll Modifiers which add Monster Modifiers to any Rares guarding the Strongbox.

name: Overencumbered
definition: Slows by 10%, reapplying this Debuff stacks and refreshes it's duration.

name: Broken Boss Faces
definition: Each "Boss Encounter" icon on the World Screen is a face which can be broken by beating the encounter. "Rare Monster Encounter" icons do not provide any bonus when broken.

name: Sinister Jewel Sockets
definition: Allocated Sinister Jewel Sockets are visible on the left edge of the character portrait in the centre of the passive skill tree. Unique Jewels cannot be socketed in Sinister Jewel Sockets, and modifiers to the effect of Jewel Sockets do not apply to Sinister Jewel Sockets. They are entirely disconnected from the rest of your passive skill tree - they are not considered to be within any radius of any other passive skill, and no passive skill is within any radius of a Sinister Jewel Socket. Multiple Sinister Jewel Sockets are also not within any radius of each other. Radius effects of Jewels will therefore have no effect when socketed in Sinister Sockets.

name: Socket-bound Augments
definition: Socket-bound Augments permanently fill any Augment Socket they are placed into. Once Socketed, they cannot be removed, replaced or extracted by any means.

name: Cascadable Skills
definition: Warcries, and Non-Channelling Spells that affect an area around you or a targeted location, are Cascadable. Certain effects can cause Cascadable Skills to Cascade, making them also affect other locations, or to Echo, affecting the same targeted location again after a delay. A Cascadable Spell that Repeats will not Cascade or Echo while Repeating.

name: Anaemia
definition: Anaemia is a Debuff that allows more than 10 Corrupted Blood debuffs to be applied to a target. The Magnitude of Anaemia determines how many additional Corrupted Blood stacks to be applied.

name: Phased Form
definition: Phased Form is a notable Ascendancy Passive Skill granted by Chronomancer granting the following stats: Take 30% less Damage. 4 seconds after being Damaged by an Enemy Hit, take Damage equal to 30% of that Hit's Damage.

name: Kalguuran Support Gem Limit
definition: The number of Kalguuran Support Gems you can use is limited by your character level: Level 1+: 1 Level 17+: 2 Level 33+: 3 Level 45+: 4 Level 65+: 5 Level 80+: 6

name: Precursor Terraformer
definition: Activating a Precursor Terraformer will change a group of nearby Basic Maps to the shown Biome. The Terraformer shows which biome it will change maps to. All maps in the Terraformed area will be replaced with maps that can appear in the shown biome.

name: Ancient Modifiers
definition: Ancient Modifiers are fragments of Precursor power, adding many varied bonus effects to areas throughout the Precursor Fortress and beyond.

name: Congealed Mist
definition: A mysterious Augment that shifts and shimmers. Is that whispering you hear?

name: Seals and Sealed Skills
definition: Sealed Skills are skills which gain Seals. Only skills you use yourself can be Sealed. When you use a Sealed Skill, its Seals are broken, and that use of the skill will gain some benefit based on how many Seals it had.

name: Raven-Touched
definition: Raven-Touched items have been warped by the Raven Trickster, Tangmazu. The influence of the mist allows you to instil the item with a Notable Passive Skill at the Withered Willow. Items that are already instillable will not be able to gain an additional instillment if they become Raven-Touched.

name: Great Beast
definition: Great Beasts are Map Bosses marked by Hilda as worthy targets to defeat. Defeating a Great Beast will earn you Hilda's Favour.

name: Hilda's Favour
definition: Hilda will reward you with an Atlas Master point to spend on Atlas Keystones.

name: Temple Currency
definition: Temple Currency are currency items found primarily throughout the Temple. These currency items typically interact with Corrupted Items in a variety of ways.

name: Anomaly Map
definition: Anomaly Maps have added requirements to access on the World Map. Bosses of these maps are Deadly and may drop an additional lineage support.

name: Landmark Area
definition: Landmark Areas in the Atlas may be accessed multiple times and do not require a Waystone to access.

name: Hiveblood
definition: Hiveblood is used to birth Wombgifts from The Genesis Tree in Monastery of the Keepers. The maximum amount of Hiveblood you can have is 100,000.

name: Vivid Spirit
definition: Vivid Spirits are a type of Azmeri Spirit. Monsters Influenced or Possessed by Vivid Spirits gain increased Skill Speed, in addition to any bonuses from the specific spirit type. Monsters Possessed by Vivid Spirits drop Dexterity items.

name: Wild Spirit
definition: Wild Spirits are a type of Azmeri Spirit. Monsters Influenced or Possessed by Wild Spirits gain increased Toughness, in addition to any bonuses from the specific spirit type. Monsters Possessed by Wild Spirits drop Strength items.

name: Primal Spirit
definition: Primal Spirits are a type of Azmeri Spirit. Monsters Influenced or Possessed by Primal Spirits deal increased damage, in addition to any bonuses from the specific spirit type. Monsters Possessed by Primal Spirits drop Intelligence items.

name: Puppet Master
definition: Puppet Master is a stacking Buff which grants: 10% increased Skill Speed with Command Skills 10% reduced Movement Speed Penalty with Command Skills Minions deal 10% increased damage with Command Skills Minions have 2% increased Movement Speed Minions have 3% increased Skill Speed Each stack has an independent duration of 8 seconds. Maximum 5 stacks.

name: Aldur's Legacies
definition: Aldur's Legacies are Augments which have taken the power of a Unique Ezomyte or Kalguuran Unique. You may not have more than one Augment of this type socketed at a time.
